title: Vocal Agent Harness Simple and Fun
brief: A fun, simple, and playful illustration showing a human throat/vocal system as an 'Agent Harness'. Cross-section view of a singer's throat and vocal cords, but styled like a cute cartoon or comic illustration with clean bold lines and flat colors. The vocal cords are drawn like two tiny robots or agents working together inside a control room. Labels in a playful way: '声带Agent (Vocal Fold Agent)', '气流驱动 (Airflow Engine)', '共鸣腔Cache (Resonance Cache)', '调音台 (Mixing Console)'. Speech bubbles with funny technical comments like 'CPU 99%!', 'Still running!'. Simple, clean, NOT complex. Flat illustration style with vibrant colors (teal, coral, gold). White or light background. Bilingual Chinese/English labels. Looks like it belongs in a fun tech explainer article, not a medical textbook.
prompt:
Create an illustration titled 'Vocal Agent Harness Simple and Fun'. Style: flat illustration, simple geometric forms, concise annotations, soft editorial look. This is for an article or essay — not a technical document. Do NOT add any diagrams, arrows, labels, callouts, or text. Focus on a concrete visual idea with atmosphere, restraint, and editorial clarity.  Language/region: zh-en. Target aspect ratio: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Brief:
